# North Lume Distribution

> Your trusted partner in product distribution across Canada, USA, and Brazil.

North Lume Distribution is a distributor with over 8 years of experience in the market, supplying high-quality products to gas stations, convenience stores, supermarkets, and retail businesses across Canada, the USA, and Brazil. Our mission is to provide reliable distribution, competitive prices, and consistent supply for our partners.

## Pages

- Home: https://northlumedistribution.ca/
- Products: https://northlumedistribution.ca/products
- Contact: https://northlumedistribution.ca/contact

## Product Categories & Brands

### Electronics & Tech
- Volt — Premium cables, earbuds, aux cords, and chargers. Volt Elite V3 and Volt Evolution 4-in-1 Tuff fast charge cables.
- Tech 361 — 36pc counter display kit with Type C, braided iPhone, braided Micro USB cables, wall and car chargers.

### Candy & Confections
- Sour Rockstar Roll Licker — Sour liquid roller candy, 75ml per piece.
- Gorilla Squeeze Duo — Sour gel slime candy in Blue Razz and Strawberry, 56ml dual-flavour.
- TNT Sour Stix — Explosive sour candy sticks in a variety of flavors.
- Squeeze Team Heroes — Hero-themed squeezable candy for kids.
- Cheeky Monkey Candy Co. — Gummies and Sours candy cones in mixed flavors.

### Food & Snacks
- Zaks Jerky — Premium Black Angus beef jerky. Traditional 120g in four bold flavors plus Big Bag varieties.
- The Butcher — Locally made 90g beef jerky in Original, Teriyaki, Hot 'N Sweet, and Hickory Smoke.
- Kokum Beef Jerky — Indigenous-owned beef jerky in 75g and 175g sizes.

### Toys & Novelties
- Die Cast Cars — Officially licensed die-cast cars with real logos, rubber tires, pull-back action, and opening doors. Over 150 models.
- 3D Minis & Creatures — Collectible 3D-printed mini figures and articulated creature toys.
- Warp Worm — Novelty toys and fidget items.

### Accessories
- Charm Buddies — Collectible bag charms on a 96pc countertop spinner rack.
- Cool Tats — Temporary tattoos in full, half, and small sizes. Over 100 designs.
- Sticker Kraze — Bamboo stickers made with real wood, vintage look, 2 to 3 inches.
- Bag Swag — Trendy bag accessories and decorative swag.
- Keysteez — Stylish keychains and keyring accessories.
- Retro Rattlers — Retro-styled sunglasses with color-shifting revo lenses and adjustable ear loops.
- Fancy Fannys — Stylish fanny packs and waist bags.
- Card Guard — Protective card holders and RFID-blocking wallets.

### Pet
- Bones Premium Pet Treats — All-natural premium pet treats: bully sticks, beef trachea, beef sticks, braided beef, cow ears, and pig ears.

### Outdoor
- Campers Campfire Sticks — 34-inch campfire roasting sticks with 10-gauge twisted steel and wooden handles.

## Contact

To learn about distribution opportunities or to place an order, visit our contact page:
https://northlumedistribution.ca/contact
